title: ebnerella swinglei
intro: Ebnerella swinglei is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ebnerella swinglei is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed for their medicinal and health benefits.
